Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh man, this is awesome! We're like a super elite task force![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}C'mon, could you at least wear it like you're supposed to?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Oh, but it does look like everyone's outfits are a bit different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Each one is made to complement our physiques and fighting styles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}They were testing the prototype out on me, but it feels even better than it did before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's very light and sturdy. I wonder if it's the same materials they use in the military, or maybe even the ones for spacesuits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Seems like this armband isn't just for decoration either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}According to the manual, there are a bunch of different features built into it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}For example, it can give you a readout of your vitals. What else...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 4 25 25}There's also a function that notifies you when you can use your Theurgy...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Sorry, it doesn't look like there's much information about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}All I can tell is that you load the cartridge into your Evoker to use it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Then let's make that our objective for today. Make sure to stay alert, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}All right, Yamagishi, you're going to be our backup, just like I mentioned before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}This time, I'll be joining the rest of you in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm going too. I gotta make sure my skills are still sharp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}All right, then including {f 4 1}, that will be our team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I was so ready for this! You can't just put me on standby![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}You stay here and support Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}When you put it that way, how can I refuse? Don't worry, Fuuka. Nothing's getting past me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Fuuka, if it gets too dangerous, just leave him behind. And don't be afraid to smack him if he tries anything funny.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Yamagishi, could you scout the area and find a good floor for us to start on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 31 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}It seems... different in here from before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Well, that's nothing new, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}No, not like that. It seems distorted... It's probably just temporary.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I'll try and find a stable floor for us to start on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}You can tell that much already? Wow, Fuuka![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}It could be because we didn't enter the usual way last time, or because of those huge Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}We have no idea what's gonna happen in here. Not that I'm complaining though.[n]{f 1 1}
